title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Managing Oily Hair and Hormonal Imbalances
description: Aloe barbadensis essential oils are a natural remedy for oily hair. This oil is rich in properties and constituents that help regulate oil production, such as aloin, aloe-emodin, and aloe-vertin. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which reduce redness and irritation on the scalp. Additionally, aloe vera contains vitamins A, C, and E, as well as beta-carotene and fatty acids, that help balance the scalp's natural pH and reduce excessive oil production. If ...
